mainEntity.name: Who is the best attorney for Litigation in St George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Halston T. Davis at Just Work Comp Law is a highly experienced attorney specializing in Litigation serving St George. Halston T. Davis is an award-winning attorney at Just Work Comp Law, dedicating 100% of his practice to workers' compensation cases. Since 2004, Mr. Davis has successfully helped hundreds of injured workers in Utah secure the compensation needed for recovery and return to work. Approximately 20% of his practice involves litigation, where he champions clients to overturn denied benefits from insurance companies. He is admitted to practice in Utah and before the United States District Court. Mr. Davis earned his Bachelor's degree from Brigham Young University and his Juris Doctor (JD) from the University of Utah. He is an active member of the Workers Injury Law & Advocacy Group, the Utah Association for Justice, and the Sutherland Institute. Outside of his legal practice, he enjoys spending time with his family and fishing in Utah's various lakes, rivers, and streams. For legal representation in workers' compensation matters, Halston T. Davis can be reached at 801-746-0290 or through the firm's free consultation service. Contact us at 801-746-0290.

mainEntity.name: Does Halston T. Davis handle Litigation cases in St George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Halston T. Davis at Just Work Comp Law specializes in Litigation and serves clients in St George and surrounding areas. Credentials: Utah Bar Admission, United States District Court Admission.
